subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Verily the ocean of utterance hath surged with the mention of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, and the Pen of Revelation hath moved in the arena [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی قد تموج بحر البیان بذکر ربک الرحمن و تحرک قلم الوحی فی میدان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
